<!-- Peblla Marketing Team Knowledge Base — Auto-generated from group chat learnings -->

# Content Review Checklist (Devil's Advocate Dimensions)

## Overview

After each role completes a deliverable, a Devil's Advocate subagent automatically challenges the work against the dimensions below. Content must pass all applicable checks before proceeding to Safer visual review.

## Rex — Scripts & Proposals

| # | Check | Question |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | Story logic | Is the narrative coherent and connected? |
| 2 | Shot transitions | Are transitions between shots explicitly described? |
| 3 | Script template | Does it follow the standard script template structure? |
| 4 | Seedance language | Are all Seedance prompts written in **Chinese**? |
| 5 | Visual style reference | Is the visual style reference embedded in **every** shot's prompt (not just the header)? |
| 6 | Ad-film structure | Is this a quick-cut ad format (not complex narrative)? |
| 7 | Task assignment | Are all asset/prep items tagged with responsible role + tool? |

## Coco — UI & Keyframes

| # | Check | Question |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | Color tokens | Strictly follows Peblla color token system? |
| 2 | Icon set | Only Feather Icons used? |
| 3 | Font | Only Roboto? |
| 4 | Brand color restraint | Brand #FF4D00 used extremely sparingly? |
| 5 | Black usage | #1A1A1A only for CTA buttons and active states? |
| 6 | Photography style | Keyframes look like realistic photography, not CG/animation? |
| 7 | Theme consistency | All images maintain the video's overall theme? |
| 8 | Design system | Correct design system used (shadcn/ui vs M3 vs POS-custom)? |

## Ace — Editing & Effects

| # | Check | Question |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | SaaS ad quality | Does the edit have SaaS advertisement-level polish? |
| 2 | No blank areas | No large blank spaces or simple slide-up-bounce animations? |
| 3 | No decorations | No orange bars, colorful borders, or cheap decorative elements? |
| 4 | Dual image coexistence | When two images are used, do they appear on the same frame? |
| 5 | Text-image association | Does text animation connect visually with images? |
| 6 | UI module completeness | Are extracted UI elements complete cards (not just color blocks)? |
| 7 | Dynamic effects | Elastic easing, staggered timing, breathing float, shadows present? |

## Sean — Blog Content

| # | Check | Question |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | SEO score | Score >= 70? |
| 2 | Internal links | 3-5 internal links with UTM parameters? |
| 3 | Hero image | Hero image configured? |
| 4 | Author title | Author title left **blank**? |
| 5 | Product verification | Peblla features/specs verified in Feishu knowledge base? |
| 6 | Alt tags | All lowercase + hyphens, 3-4 words? |
| 7 | Readability | Hemingway grade 9-12? |
| 8 | Schema | FAQPage JSON-LD with 6-9 Q&A pairs injected? |

## Miach — Social Media

| # | Check | Question |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | LinkedIn scope | Using company page only (not personal)? |
| 2 | UTM parameters | All links include correct UTM? |
| 3 | Reddit zero-brand | No brand name mentioned in Reddit posts/comments? |
| 4 | Reddit tone | Written in casual American English without dashes? |
| 5 | Approval | Posted to group for review before execution? |

## Noah — GEO Reports

| # | Check | Question |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | Fresh data | All data from this week's testing (not carried forward)? |
| 2 | AI verbatim quotes | Each entry cites exact AI response text? |
| 3 | Week-over-week | Includes W/W comparison showing progress/regression? |
| 4 | Dual-column comparison | Peblla vs competitors side by side? |
| 5 | All 4 platforms | Google AI Overview, Perplexity, ChatGPT, Gemini all tested? |

## Universal Checks (All Roles)

| # | Check | Question |
|---|-------|----------|
| 1 | Brand name | "Peblla" spelled correctly everywhere? |
| 2 | SUNMI logo | No SUNMI branding visible in any visual asset? |
| 3 | Product accuracy | Peblla product information is factually correct? |
| 4 | OKR alignment | Does this deliverable serve the core objective? |

## Failure Protocol

1. Devil's Advocate outputs specific issue list
2. Original role revises automatically
3. Re-submitted for another round
4. **Maximum 3 rounds** — after 3 failures, content + issue list posted to group for human intervention
